tools.name: show_incident_dashboard
tools.description: Open an interactive ServiceNow incident dashboard widget showing incidents with priority, state, and assignee. Use when the user wants to see, browse, or get an overview of incidents.

tools.name: search_incidents
tools.description: Search ServiceNow incidents by status, priority, assignee, or keyword. Returns up to 20 results.

tools.name: get_incident
tools.description: Get full details of a single ServiceNow incident by its number.

tools.name: create_incident
tools.description: Create a new incident in ServiceNow.

tools.name: update_incident
tools.description: Update fields on an existing ServiceNow incident.

tools.name: resolve_incident
tools.description: Resolve a ServiceNow incident with close notes.

tools.name: assign_incident
tools.description: Route an incident to the correct IT assignment group. Auto-routes from the incident category (Network, Hardware, Software, Database, Service Desk) when no group is given.

tools.name: search_changes
tools.description: Search ServiceNow change requests by state, type, or assignment group.

tools.name: get_change
tools.description: Get full details of a change request by its number.

tools.name: create_change
tools.description: Create a new change request in ServiceNow.
